LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES MADE IN THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Plaintiff PRECILA BALABBO's Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted as unopposed.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order and consequent judgment.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/CK)
